entities.name: Gmail API
entities.context: Email service interface used for scanning emails

entities.name: Email Scanner
entities.context: Tool for discovering and extracting information from meeting-related emails

entities.name: Staging Queue
entities.context: Queue where discovered contacts await enrichment

entities.name: Contact Enrichment
entities.context: Process for enriching contact information with additional data

entities.name: Stakeholder Profiles
entities.context: Profiles containing enriched data about stakeholders

relationships.context: Gmail API is used by the Email Scanner to discover meeting-related emails
Email Scanner populates the Staging Queue with discovered contacts
Staging Queue feeds contacts to Contact Enrichment for data enhancement
Contact Enrichment provides enriched data for Stakeholder Profiles
